transcript: This exercise is for your shoulders and the muscles in your back. It will help fight rounded shoulders and give you a better posture. Hold the band tightly in front of your chest, keep your arms straight and slowly pull apart. Focus on squeezing your shoulder blades together. The breathing technique is the same. Exhale during your effort, inhale while you release the tension. For each exercise, you should aim for two sets of 10 to 15 repetitions.
